title: I put up a RAK 1W repeater some time

messages.author: OSIRIS
messages.text: You are absolutely correct and I realized that after sending my message. I almost went back and deleted it but then decided I truly deserved to be pubicly shamed.
messages.content_html: You are absolutely correct and I realized that after sending my message. I almost went back and deleted it but then decided I truly deserved to be pubicly shamed.
messages.reply_html:
Christopher A. Wichura
Maybe I'm just blind. But from your attached photo, it doesn't look like you have the external antenna connected to the LoRa antenna connector. Doesn't look like you have ANYTHING connected to the LoRa connector of the 1W board (it's the one at the very far end of the board). Which means you may now have also burned out the LoRa radio.
